title.en-US: The best way to build and host a free static website in 2023

description.en-US: I'm building a static generated Next.js app hosted on GitHub pages. It's fast!

body.en-US:
Hello world. [Next.js](https://nextjs.org/) is awesome! I'm building a new website and gave myself a few challenges/requirements.

- No or low cost
- Performant
- Dynamic content
- Scalable
- Uses modern tooling
- Easy CI/CD

After doing [some research](https://savjee.be/blog/Static-website-hosting-who-is-fastest/) this is what I came up with:

## Recipe:
- Framework: [Next.js](https://nextjs.org/)
- Hosting: [Github Pages](https://docs.github.com/en/pages/getting-started-with-github-pages/creating-a-github-pages-site) (free)
- CI/CD: [Build and Deploy Next.js App to GitHub Pages](https://github.com/marketplace/actions/next-pages) (free with GitHub Actions)
- CMS by [Contentful](https://www.contentful.com/) (free tier)
- DNS by [AWS Route 53](https://aws.amazon.com/route53/)

It is virtually free to host minus the cost of the domain name. Being a static site it is also [very performant](https://pagespeed.web.dev/analysis/https-www-audeos-com/oe7j8nbu9e?form_factor=mobile). Using [Create Next App](https://nextjs.org/docs/api-reference/create-next-app) made setting up dev and build environment easy af. 

In order to get free hosting on GitHub Pages the codebase repository must be open source. 👀 Check out my [source code](https://github.com/aud-eos/aud-eos.github.io)!

title.en-US: I got to DJ a Wedding Reception at the Roche Harbor Resort in Friday Harbor, WA

description.en-US: I was blessed with the opportunity to DJ for my friends wedding at the Roche Harbor Resort in Friday Harbor, Washington. Great times!

body.en-US:
> Friday Harbor is a town in San Juan County, Washington, United States. The population was 2,162 at 2010 Census. Located on San Juan Island, Friday Harbor is the major commercial center of the San Juan Islands archipelago and is the county seat of San Juan County. [Wikipedia](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Friday_Harbor%2C_Washington)

Checkout the event space [Roche Harbor Resort](https://www.rocheharbor.com/), it was beautiful.

title.en-US: Canter's Deli Custom T-Shirt Design

description.en-US: I designed a custom T-Shirt for the homey's bachelor party based on this classic Canter's Deli T-Shirt

body.en-US:
Received this email from one of my buddies.

> I need a illustration done for my friends Batchelor party. I’ve attached a few pictures of him.
>
> We want to use the ‘CANTERS’ illustration attached, but with his face instead of that woman face. So it’s a side profile that needs to be illustrated. Also, can you make sure the hands are male hands holding the sandwich?

![Canter's Deli Original Design](//images.ctfassets.net/pvyz1kbxgmyk/3eSJ8OsWnZOsXdyyXZdiev/d22b21e0dce7ec4de40a1cca382899d1/01Web.jpg)

And this is what I came up with:

![Canter's Deli Custom Design](//images.ctfassets.net/pvyz1kbxgmyk/4eo9GKkKzkafHXo1RDsWS0/eba108a693227f8ffb2055403a95891b/Canters_Design_Color_transp.png)

title.en-US: 206-HOP at Seattle's Pike Place Market

description.en-US: I opened up a shop in the basement level of the Pike Place Market

body.en-US:
> 206-HOP, the new store below the Pike Place Fish Market, is the first Seattle shop dedicated to carrying exclusively local hiphop music, videos, and books, making this the place that anybody and everybody who considers him or herself a supporter should come through. Starting a store with exclusively local product is a bold move, but the folks at Crisis Clothing know how important the local community here is, and they're setting out to be a resource for artists and fans alike. - [The Stranger](https://www.thestranger.com/music/2003/08/14/15289/the-hiphop-tip)

title.en-US: The Six Social 4 Year Anniversary Party with DJ Audeos
